name: Random Password Generator
description: Generate strong, secure, and customizable passwords instantly. Choose your password length and character types to keep your accounts safe and protected.

name: BMI Calculator
description: Calculate your Body Mass Index (BMI) instantly using standard WHO guidelines. Enter your height and weight to see your BMI value and category, with clear explanations and health tips.

name: Haptic Playground
description: Design, preview, and export custom haptic vibration patterns for the web. Choose from presets or build your own using a visual timeline editor with intensity and duration controls.
